conclusion: Academic saturation is not established in wave 5. The former blocker was independently verified, accepted, and ingested; round 2 candidate review is complete but its 10% net-new accepted yield is above the strict threshold. Rounds 1 and 3 remain eligible at 0%.
acceptance_boundary: Only identifiable named-organization evidence of an implemented learning or improvement mechanism qualifies. Generic theory, aggregate surveys, anonymous or pseudonymous cases, and generic tooling do not qualify.
